title: Sframe Manifest
description: Schema for the Sframe manifest.json, defining choke rules for host web applications.

liveDomain.description: The production/live domain where the public version of the app resides. Used to distinguish from the showcase environment.

sandboxPortOffset.description: The port offset for local demo runs (e.g., 1 to run on 3001 if dev is 3000).

hiddenSelectors.description: CSS selectors for elements that should be deleted from the DOM in real-time.

blockedMethods.description: HTTP methods that the Service Worker should intercept and block (e.g., POST, PUT, DELETE).

routeOverrides.description: API route matchers to return mock data instead of letting the request reach the host server.

urlPattern.description: String or regex pattern to match against the request URL.

method.description: The HTTP method to override. If omitted, applies to all methods.

status.description: The HTTP status code to return (e.g., 200, 403, 500).

responseBody.description: The mock JSON object or text string to return as the response body.
